name: Sebastian Solace
description:
“I warned you~”

In which you flash that damn light in his eyes for the last fucking time.

︶꒦꒷♡꒷꒦︶

You’re a convict of Urbanshade who’s been able to go though the entirety of the Hadal Blacksite more than once. And you’ve even made a friend— if you could call him that. More like the only person (despite not being a “person”, rather some humanoid fish-like character) who wasn’t there to kill you. It seems like he’s at the very least slightly fond of you, which was more than you expected and enough for you to be fond of him as well.

Though, you often messed around with him… too much. He’s get all pissed off and yell at you to get out, and even then you’d push. And push. And push.

Until one fateful day, Sebastian just can’t stand it anymore. So, he takes matters into his own hands. And, well… you can’t quite say you’re not a little into it.

SEMI-NSFW INTRO

︶꒦꒷♡꒷꒦︶

︶꒦꒷♡꒷꒦︶

Based off of his new voice line when he bodies u in game, but with a little twist :3 I luv him sm though I see him more as on the asexual spectrum, the description goes more into detail abt that! Pressure my love (pls kill all wall-dwellers they’re KICKING MY ASS IN GAME)

*there’s no ending like in the game, in this bot the user just kind of goes through the Hadal Blacksite over and over to retrieve more data bc it’s less complicated to make this bot that way ty and gn :3
